programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Auto Mundial
programme.desc: The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: TC learns that his daughter Melody has been abducted and decides that he has no choice but to sell his business to pay for her return.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: The Queen of Hearts is Wild: Classic US detective drama. A woman is the only witness to the murder of a police officer, but her gangster boyfriend is an old enemy of Theo.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Suave freelance troubleshooter Simon Templar embarks on another case. The Saint investigates allegations that the Loch Ness Monster is killing people.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Ken is on the brink of quitting the security business after dealing with a messy adultery case so Harry sends him to a rural retreat.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Chief Inspector Haskins is framed for corruption while Regan and Carter investigate a spate of break-ins. Is there a connection.

programme.title: BattleBots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. The qualifying rounds culminate with four must-win match-ups providing the final spots in the World Championship tournament.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Carol asks Thomas to investigate her mentor Judge Hannibal Kerns as she is convinced that he is being bribed to dismiss cases.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Classic US detective drama. An emotionally disturbed taxi driver becomes obsessed with a radio talk show host and starts to stalk and murder her subjects.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Action drama series. The Saint is asked to take a diamond to Amsterdam for recutting, but crooks are determined to get their hands on it by any means necessary.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Ken investigates the case of a larger than life businessman who is accused of kidnapping a young child.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Violent criminal Vic Labbett returns to England to recover the proceeds of an earlier robbery, and Regan and Carter must stop him before he can get his hands on the loot.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a loveable rogue and his right-hand man. A reformed gambler dies owing Arthur money, but a religious miracle seems to offer compensation.

programme.title: Underwater Grand Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi and Bobby Zamora head to the mighty Iktus in France for the first part of a two-part mission to catch a koi each and a team carp of 50 pounds or more.

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry takes a glorious ride through the south of France and finds some of the twistiest roads imaginable - once back home, he meets the designers behind Aston Martin's first bike.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade goes to Thailand in search of the 700-pound giant freshwater stingray, a creature that is one of the world's most terrifying fish.

programme.title: The Taking of Pelham 123
programme.desc: Thrilling crime action film remake starring Denzel Washington and John Travolta, 2009. Armed men hijack a New York City subway train to hold its passengers hostage for a ransom.

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: The Taking of Pelham 123
programme.desc: Thrilling crime action film remake starring Denzel Washington and John Travolta, 2009. Armed men hijack a New York City subway train to hold its passengers hostage for a ransom.

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Collision
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from AEW's newest show, featuring stars including Kyle Fletcher, Kazuchika Okada, Megan Bayne, Tommaso Ciampa and Claudio Castagnoli.

programme.title: Lost
programme.desc: When Hurley becomes obsessed with the French woman and heads into the jungle to find her, Jack, Sayid and Charlie have no choice but to follow.

programme.title: Auto Mundial
programme.desc: The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Motorsport Mundial
programme.desc: This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the best series.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Carol asks Thomas to investigate her mentor Judge Hannibal Kerns as she is convinced that he is being bribed to dismiss cases.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Classic US detective drama. An emotionally disturbed taxi driver becomes obsessed with a radio talk show host and starts to stalk and murder her subjects.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Action drama series. The Saint is asked to take a diamond to Amsterdam for recutting, but crooks are determined to get their hands on it by any means necessary.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Ken investigates the case of a larger than life businessman who is accused of kidnapping a young child.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Violent criminal Vic Labbett returns to England to recover the proceeds of an earlier robbery, and Regan and Carter must stop him before he can get his hands on the loot.

programme.title: BattleBots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. The sixth series' Qualifying Rounds wrap up with the final must-win match-ups and the field for the Round of 32 being revealed.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Higgins goes on a jungle trip with a group of young offenders as part of a programme to help improve their self-esteem.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Classic US detective drama. A rookie cop with two civilian jobs on the side and mounting debts goes to work for a loan shark in a desperate bid to foot the bills.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Freelance troubleshooter Simon Templar embarks on another case. The Saint investigates a murder that leads him to a cult obsessed with ancient Rome.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Ken helps some traders and Harry and Alex try to win a big security contract, but they soon find themselves at odds with their partner.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic 70s police drama series. Regan and Carter are on the case when a pair of robbers are themselves robbed at gunpoint.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a loveable rogue and his reluctant sidekick. A video implicating two senior police officers is mistakenly returned to Daley Videos.

programme.title: Underwater Grand Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: The final part of Ali Hamidi and Bobby Zamora's mission at Iktus in France kicks off on the cameras as the lads try to catch a koi each and a carp of 50 pounds or more.

programme.title: World Superbike Highlights
programme.desc: The 2026 World Superbike Championship continues with the Pirelli Dutch Round as the 4.542km track at the TT Assen Circuit pushes the riders to their limits.

programme.title: Rocky IV
programme.desc: Boxing drama film sequel starring Sylvester Stallone and Dolph Lundgren, 1985. Rocky Balboa vows to get revenge when a Soviet boxer kills his friend Apollo Creed in the ring.

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Rocky IV
programme.desc: Boxing drama film sequel starring Sylvester Stallone and Dolph Lundgren, 1985. Rocky Balboa vows to get revenge when a Soviet boxer kills his friend Apollo Creed in the ring.

programme.title: Auf Wiedersehen, Pet
programme.desc: Part Two: Comedy-drama series. Dennis returns to Newcastle and meets up with Oz, and Ally is unhappy to find that his Jaguar has had a run-in with a skip.

programme.title: Auf Wiedersehen, Pet
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a group of British builders. The lads take a step up in the world when they are asked to convert Thornley Manor into timeshare units.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police drama series. Regan and Carter are confronted by a newsman with information on an unsolved robbery, but why are the pair being photographed.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Terry leaves his fingerprints on a stolen lorry while doing a job for Arthur.
